description: Lock Merchant Accounting Manuals to source-backed printed bookkeeping/accounting manuals rather than later market-information or generic textbook infrastructure.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to Pacioli's Summa printed in Venice in 1494.
The accounting manual teaches and disseminates double-entry bookkeeping methods.
The node is itself an early printed accounting manual, not a later standardized-textbook infrastructure dependent.
Printed financial price lists are later commercial information infrastructure, not a prerequisite for the 1494 accounting manual.
